steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content: Both given values are $f(0)=5$ and $f(7)=5$. Slope $= \dfrac{5-5}{7-0} = 0$, so $f$ is a constant function.

steps.title: Evaluate Each Choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — $ f(x) = 0 $: A constant function always returning 0 contradicts $f(0)=5$. ✗
  • Choice B — $ f(x) = 7 $: A constant function returning 7 contradicts $f(0)=5$. ✗
  • Choice C — $ f(x) = 5 $: A constant function returning 5 satisfies $f(0)=5$ and $f(7)=5$. ✓
  • Choice D — $ f(x) = x + 5 $: This has slope 1, not 0; also $f(7)=12 \neq 5$. ✗
C is correct.
